overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a modern, upscale interior lobby with dark wood paneling and flooring. The camera approaches a set of reflective wooden double doors in a continuous, smooth movement through an empty, warmly lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment lobby with wood-paneled walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an empty modern lobby toward a set of wooden double doors on the left wall

entered.detail: large dark wood panel doors with metallic horizontal handles and reflective surfaces
bright red wall-mounted emergency or fire safety box visible on the far wall
warm yellow recessed lighting fixtures mounted on the wood-paneled wall
dark wood grain paneling covering the left wall of the corridor
dark rectangular floor mat positioned in front of the double doors

segments.scene_description: The player walks through an empty, upscale interior lobby characterized by dark wood paneling and warm artificial lighting. The camera approaches a set of reflective wooden double doors on the left wall, passing a black floor mat, while a red emergency box remains visible in the distant background on the far wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet, upscale interior lobby that leads toward a set of reflective wooden doors. It begins by gliding through an empty space defined by dark wood paneling and warm artificial lighting. As the camera advances, it passes a black floor mat while keeping a red emergency box visible in the distant background on the far wall. The movement then narrows its focus, steadily approaching the polished surface of the double doors on the left.
